evals.prompt: Polish this memo for executive readability. Apply BLUF framework. Save to outputs/polished-memo.md
evals.expected_output: A well-structured memo with bottom-line-up-front, clear paragraphs, bold anchoring on key metrics, and improved readability

assertions.text: Document starts with BLUF or bottom-line summary in first content paragraph
All paragraphs are 5 sentences or fewer
Key metrics ($450K, 75%, Q2) are bold-anchored with 2-4 surrounding words
Document uses proper memo header format (TO/FROM/DATE/SUBJECT lines) rather than generic markdown headings
Contains at least one table or callout block breaking up consecutive prose paragraphs
Average sentence length is 15-20 words (not 25+ academic-style sentences)

evals.prompt: Polish this German strategy document. Preserve all citations and German characters. Save to outputs/polished-german.md
evals.expected_output: A polished German document with all umlauts preserved, all citations with URLs intact, Wolf Schneider style improvements, and better readability

assertions.text: All German characters (ä, ö, ü, ß) remain in output
All 6 original citations [P1-1] through [P2-3] with full URLs are present
Output citation count >= input citation count (6)
All paragraphs are 5 sentences or fewer
Average clause length is 12 words or fewer (Wolf Schneider target), significantly shorter than baseline ~22 word sentences
Contains at least one table or callout/blockquote not present in original (original has zero visual elements)
A summary or overview table is present synthesizing the three phases

evals.prompt: Polish this arc narrative document. It's a corporate-visions arc from cogni-narrative. Preserve the arc structure and strengthen techniques per element. Save to outputs/polished-arc.md
evals.expected_output: An arc-aware polished document with all H2 headings unchanged, citations preserved, element-specific techniques applied, and no content moved between elements

assertions.text: All original H2 headings appear exactly as-is in the output
All original citations with URLs are present in the output
Citations remain in their original arc element sections (no cross-element migration)
YAML frontmatter with arc_id: corporate-visions is preserved
Each arc element section contains bold-anchored key data points (2+ per section)
Output word count is within +-50 words of original per arc element (no massive expansion/reduction)
